_comment: JetBrains ZombieCoder External Tool - SSOT Auto-Generator
_usage: Import this as External Tool in JetBrains IDEs (Settings > Tools > External Tools)

tools.name: ZombieCoder: Generate SSOT
tools.description: Auto-generate SSOT.md for current project via ZombieCoder Bridge
tools.arguments: -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { $dir = '${ProjectFileDir$}'; if (-not $dir) { $dir = '${ContentRoot$}' }; if (-not $dir) { $dir = '${FileDir$}' }; if (-not $dir) { $dir = (Get-Location).Path }; $payload = @{ directory = $dir } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:9999/v1/agent/directory' -Method Post -Body $payload -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output ('SSOT Ready: ' + ($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)) } catch { Write-Output ('Error: ' + $_.Exception.Message) }"

tools.name: ZombieCoder: Chat with Agent
tools.description: Open ZombieCoder agent chat for current file context
tools.arguments: -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { $payload = @{ model = 'mimo-v2.5-free'; messages = @(@{ role = 'user'; content = 'Analyze the current project structure and suggest improvements.' }) } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 -Compress; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:9999/v1/agent/chat' -Method Post -Body $payload -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 30; $text = ($r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 -Compress); Write-Output $text.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(1000, $text.Length)) } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message }"

tools.name: ZombieCoder: Project Status
tools.arguments: -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:9999/v1/agent/status' -TimeoutSec 5; $text = ($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress); Write-Output $text.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(500, $text.Length)) } catch { Write-Output 'Bridge not running' }"
